reference: Hello, a hungry child is often not a major problem. Make sure she eats a proper diet with adequate calories. She might need sufficient water and fiber intake to avoid constipation. Once her bowel habits are normalized, her eating will be fine.
text: Hello. A hungry child is often not a major problem. Make sure she eats the proper diet with adequate calories. She might need sufficient water and fiber intake to avoid constipation. Once her bowel habits are normalized, her eating will be fine.
